creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Hugo Silva wrote:
> I was updating the haproxy13 port to 1.3.10.2 yesterday, and today I
> noticed I made a mistake:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112633
>
> Synopsis:    Update port: net/haproxy -- to version 1.3.10.2
>
> I meant net/haproxy13. Someone handed it over to clement@. net/haproxy
> is the 1.2 branch, I've created haproxy13/ precisely because it's the
> 1.3 branch (and I couldn't reach clement@ for a few months).
>
> I don't know who else to contact to have this fixed. Can you help ?
>
> Best regards,
>
> Hugo
>
Hey Hugo,

I can close the another PR(112407)? Because, You has the duplicate PR 
112407 and 112633.
You does not worry, I send one mail to clement@ and request total
attention in this PR!

Best Regards.

-- 
Marcelo Araujo
araujo@FreeBSD.org
http://www.FreeBSD.org
